etymology.description: semantic дё· (divide) + phonetic иұ• (shЗҗ, "pig") -> original meaning unclear
etymology.interpretation: The character г’ё combines the semantic component дё·, representing 'divide,' with the phonetic component иұ• (shЗҗ, "pig") to form a character whose original semantic meaning is unclear. It serves as a phonetic element in characters like йҒӮ(йҒӮ) (suГ¬, "comply") and was not originally related to pigs but used for phonetic purposes.
